name: applies-to
description: Which types, extensions, or contexts this invariant or requirement applies to.

aiGuidance.purpose: Which types, extensions, or contexts this invariant or requirement applies to.
aiGuidance.extraction: List the types, extension identifiers, or conceptual contexts that are in scope. Use prose or comma-separated values. E.g. 'Record (all tiers)', 'ext:lifecycle, ext:federation', 'all implementations'.
